description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the continuumio/miniconda3:latest Docker image with a global before_script that runs apt-get update -q -y, installs libgl1-mesa-glx and build-essential, configures conda (always_yes, adds conda-forge channel, strict priority), updates conda, installs mamba, creates three environments with mamba env create -f conda/skijumpdesign-lib.yml, conda/skijumpdesign-lib-dev.yml and conda/skijumpdesign-lib-opt-dev.yml, and finally runs mamba info. Define stages install, test, docs, test_dev and test_dev_optional. In the install stage add an install job that activates the skijumpdesign-lib environment, runs python setup.py install and prints the location of the skijumpdesign executable. In the test stage add a test job that activates skijumpdesign-lib, lists packages with mamba list, and verifies the library by executing python -c "import skijumpdesign". In the docs stage add a docs job that activates skijumpdesign-lib-dev, changes to the docs/ directory and runs make html. In the test_dev stage add a test_dev job that activates skijumpdesign-lib-dev, lists packages, and runs py.test --cov=skijumpdesign, and in the test_dev_optional stage add a test_dev_optional job that activates skijumpdesign-lib-opt-dev, lists packages, and runs py.test --cov=skijumpdesign.
